summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Marvin's Contracting portfolio website redesign completed successfully. All major features working correctly including Hero section, Trust signals, Services, Portfolio gallery with filters, Lightbox, Before/After slider, Contact form, Language toggle (EN/ES), and Mobile navigation.

minor.issue: MongoDB connection failing - using fallback mock data (MOCKED API)

issues: Missing DialogTitle for accessibility - console warning: 'DialogContent requires a DialogTitle for screen reader users'

action_items: Consider adding VisuallyHidden DialogTitle to Lightbox component for accessibility compliance
Optional: Add proper before/after project images to the Before/After slider section (currently shows two random gallery images)
critical_code_review_comments: Accessibility: Lightbox component missing DialogTitle/aria-describedby for screen reader support
seed_data_creation: Using fallback mock gallery data from /frontend/src/mock/data.js
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features tested and working. Gallery API using mock fallback data. Contact form uses Formspree (https://formspree.io/f/mojnzzwr). Language toggle properly switches between EN/ES. Mobile navigation hamburger menu working correctly.

hero_section.details: Hero displays correctly with background image, headline 'Quality Craftsmanship. Reliable Service.', subheadline, Licensed & Insured badge, two CTA buttons (Request a Free Estimate, View Our Work)

phone_click_to_call.details: Phone number (240) 467-4308 in nav is click-to-call link (tel:+12404674308)

trust_signals_bar.details: All 4 trust signals displayed: 20+ Years Experience, Licensed & Insured, 5-Star Rated, Locally Owned

services_section.details: 4 service cards displayed with icons (Kitchen Remodeling, Bathroom Renovation, Flooring, Painting) and View Projects links

portfolio_gallery.details: Gallery displays images with all 5 category filter buttons working (All, Kitchen, Bathroom, Flooring, Painting)

lightbox.details: Gallery images open in lightbox with prev/next navigation and close button working

before_after_slider.details: Before/After slider component (react-compare-slider) renders with two images and Before/After labels

contact_form.details: All form fields present and fillable: Name, Email, Phone, Service dropdown, Message textarea. Submit button works. Uses Formspree integration.

language_toggle.details: Language toggle (EN/ES) switches all content including nav, hero text, services, trust signals, CTAs to Spanish

mobile_navigation.details: Hamburger menu opens/closes correctly, shows all nav items (Home, Services, Portfolio, About Us, Contact) and phone number

mocked_apis_list: /api/gallery - using fallback mock data from frontend/src/mock/data.js
